## Type of change

- [ ] New lesson (MDX content)
- [ ] New or updated quiz
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Code / tooling change
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format` applied
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (validates content frontmatter and quiz data)
- [ ] For content: set the correct `track`, and used `draft: true` if unfinished
